chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1245 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 23.11.2022 Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Jawed Akhtar Shaikh (Additional District Health Officer, Sukkur on behalf of District Health Officer, Sukkur) and Dr. Salahuddin Shah (Medical Superintendent, Taluka Hospital Pano Aqil)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant petition, the petitioner, who is serving as Male Nurse in Taluka Hospital Pano Aqil, seeks directions to the respondents to vacate the Quarter No. C-03 located in Taluka Hospital Pano Aqil on the ground that illegal private maternity clinic is being run by respondent No.10. In response to the petition, comments have been filed by respondent No.4 (District Health Officer, Sukkur), alleging therein that no private maternity home is being run in the subject quarter. Besides, respondent No.10 has also filed her counter-affidavit denying the alleged allegation of the petitioner. The aforesaid comments were filed by the said respondent on 10.12.2020 and no counter-affidavit has been filed by the petitioner till date to deny the contentions of the said respondents, which shows that the instant petition has been filed by the petitioner misconceiving the facts. Accordingly, the same is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
